title: SALKING Essential Oil Diffuser, 100ml Small Aromatherapy Diffuser, Ultrasonic Diffusers with Auto Shut-Off Function, Cool Mist Humidifier with Warm White Lights, for Office Home (Dark)
features: Compact and Versatile - Our small oil diffuser is designed to be compact and versatile, making it suitable for various spaces and lifestyles. Now available in a stylish dark wood grain finish, it adds a touch of natural elegance to your home or office. Aromatherapy diffusers sleek and portable design allows you to easily move it from room to room, so you can enjoy aromatherapy wherever you go-whether you’re unwinding in the bedroom, working in the office, or traveling on the road.

All-in-One Button - Enjoy ultimate convenience with our user-friendly one-button operation. With just a single press, you can effortlessly control all functions of this mini ultrasonic diffuser. Easily switch between light modes or start your favorite mist setting—simple, quick, and hassle-free.

Enhanced Night Light - Our compact portable diffuser featuring 8 soft lighting options, including a cozy warm yellow glow, this electric diffusers doubles as a soothing night light. The gentle illumination creates a relaxing atmosphere, perfect for meditation, bedtime, or simply adding a tranquil touch to any room.

BPA-Free and Whisper-Quiet Operation - Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free materials, this essential oil diffuser is safe for you and the environment. The ultrasonic technology ensures ultra-quiet operation, allowing you to relax, work, or sleep without interruptions—just pure, peaceful aromatherapy.

Automatic Shut-Off - Safety and peace of mind come first. When the water runs out, the auto shut-off feature automatically powers down the diffuser, preventing damage and ensuring safe use. Enjoy your favorite scents without the need for constant monitoring.
description: Product Description MULTIPLE SELECTION WHITE WOODEN GRAIN DARK WOODEN GRAIN STYLE Compact Size STYLE Compact Size STYLE Compact Size RUN TIME Up to 8 Hours RUN TIME Up to 8 Hours RUN TIME Up to 8 Hours LIGHT Warm White + 7 RGB Light LIGHT Warm White + 7 RGB Light LIGHT Warm White + 7 RGB Light NOISE LEVEL Ultra-quiet (<24dB) NOISE LEVEL Ultra-quiet (<24dB) NOISE LEVEL Ultra-quiet (<24dB) SAFETY Auto Shut-Off Function SAFETY Auto Shut-Off Function SAFETY Auto Shut-Off Function LIGHT ON The soft LED glow gives just enough light to create an extremely relaxing environment. Add your favorite scent of essential oils and enjoy the long-lasting fragrances given off by this brilliant Aroma Diffuser. LIGHT OFF Supports working without lights on mode without affecting your sleep. Sets a calming mood and fills the air surrounding you with fragrances that improve your mood. Small Ultrasonic Diffuser COMPACT AND POWERFUL This is a small but powerful Essential Oil Diffuser, which is easy to use and carry. It is a great decorative tool to have in your home that can help you create a relaxing and soothing atmosphere with the use of essential oils. REMOVE Twist lightly to take off the cover from the unit PLUG Connect power adapter to power jack underneath power buttons ADD Fill water tank to under the max line and add 2-3 drops of essential oil OPERATE Recover the shell and press ON/OFF button to work
